scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.test:fastapi: cd backend_fastapi && python test_pipeline.py && python -m unittest test_sequence_model.py && python integration_audit.py --strict --output result.json
scripts.verify:all: npm test && npm run test:fastapi && npm run build --prefix frontend
